shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200
python3 -m build --version || true; python3 -m pip show pypiserver || true; python3 -m pip show build || true; python3 -m pip show twine || true
find /home/user/workspace/vectorops_pkg -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "--- {}"; sed -n "1,200p" "{}"'
sleep 2; cat /home/user/workspace/pypiserver.log || true; ss -ltn '( sport = :8080 )' || true

python3 -m venv /home/user/workspace/testenv && . /home/user/workspace/testenv/bin/activate && pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1],[0,1]); print(dotproduct([1,2,3],[4,5,6]))"
curl -s http://localhost:8080/simple/ && echo && echo '---' && curl -s http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/
